hero.headline: SONARA
hero.subtitle: Vocal Experiences for Wellbeing
hero.body: We design and facilitate vocal experiences based on singing and music therapy to regulate stress, prevent burnout, and strengthen communication, cohesion, and performance in corporate teams.

approach.heading: Our Approach
approach.intro: Our vocal experiences are strategically oriented towards corporate environments that understand that sustainable performance begins with team care.

pillars.title: Healthy Productivity
pillars.body: Team care goes beyond wellbeing: it is the foundation of solid performance. We work on burnout prevention and stress management, strengthening mental clarity, resilience, and collaboration within teams.

pillars.title: Applied Creativity
pillars.body: We activate creativity as a tool to strengthen innovation, adaptability, and the resolution of complex situations.

pillars.title: Scientific Foundation
pillars.body: Our sessions are grounded in principles of music therapy and nervous system regulation, applied in a structured way to strengthen cohesion, communication, and trust within teams.

testimonials.quote: It was a new way of connecting with my body and emotions in a fun and safe space. Working in a group meant we all felt comfortable and truly connected.
A beautiful and caring encounter that allows self-knowledge and enjoyment through voice and music, both for those with experience and those who have never explored their voice.
I came in with shame and left feeling comfortable, accompanied and deeply connected to my voice and the group. A beautiful, safe and playful space.

contact.body: Get in touch with us to design a personalised vocal experience that drives creative culture and mental wellbeing in your organisation.
contact.heading: Bring Sonara to your team or community.
contact.formBody: We would love to meet you and understand how we can support you. Tell us what you are looking for and we will be in touch as soon as possible.
